title: Allogene (ALLO) Focuses on Pipeline Amid Lack of Marketed Drugs
text: Allogene remains focused on advancing its pipeline of allogeneic CAR T product candidates while without any currently marketed drugs. The company's strategy relies on successful clinical trial outcomes, particularly from the pivotal ALPHA3 study in first-line large B-cell lymphoma consolidation. Despite the lack of approved products, the company maintains strong clinical momentum with multiple programs in development. Investors are watching for key clinical milestones that could drive near-term catalysts for the stock.
